title: Bearinglessfull Collateral: A Risk Primitive for Distributed Hedge Capacity
citation: Skrobynets, Joseph. Bearinglessfull Collateral: A Risk Primitive for Distributed Hedge Capacity. Working paper.

endpoints.name: Bearinglessfull Score
endpoints.description: Computes a weighted collateral resilience score from normalized component scores. Inputs are expected on a 0 to 1 scale.
assumptions: Weights are operator-specified from the paper manifest and should be updated if the paper changes.
This computes the paper specification; it does not prove market safety or profitability.

endpoints.name: Reserve Buffer Ratio
endpoints.description: Computes available reserve divided by required reserve.
assumptions: A ratio above 1 means available reserve exceeds required reserve.
Required reserve must be greater than zero.

endpoints.name: Liquidation Distance
endpoints.description: Computes relative distance between current collateral ratio and liquidation collateral ratio.
assumptions: Ratios must use the same scale.
Liquidation collateral ratio must be greater than zero.
